senses.name: Infrared Vision
senses.description: See heat signatures through barriers up to 10cm thick. Each additional purchase increases penetration by 10x (10cm → 1m → 10m → 100m). Certain hyperdense materials may be challenging.

senses.name: Darkvision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see clearly in complete darkness as if it were dim light.

senses.name: Enhanced Hearing
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to hear sounds at frequencies beyond the normal human range or at much greater distances.

senses.name: Scent Enhancement
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to identify specific individuals, substances, or emotional states through smell.

senses.name: Tactile Sensitivity
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect minute textures, vibrations, or temperature differences through touch.

senses.name: Magnetic Sense
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to determine cardinal directions and detect magnetic fields or metal objects.

senses.name: Lie Detection
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect when someone is deliberately lying or withholding the truth.

senses.name: Scent Tracking
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to follow trails by scent, even if they are hours or days old.

senses.name: Echolocation
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to navigate and identify objects in complete darkness using sound reflection. The range is Tier × 10 spaces.

senses.name: Thermal Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see heat signatures through walls and detect living creatures by their body temperature.

senses.name: Microscopic Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see cellular-level detail, identify microscopic organisms, or examine fine craftsmanship.

senses.name: Tremor Sense
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect movement and identify creatures through ground vibrations. The range is Tier × 5 spaces.

senses.name: Aura Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive emotional states, health conditions, and supernatural auras around living beings.

senses.name: Time Sense
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive temporal distortions, time dilation effects, or chronological inconsistencies.

senses.name: Precognitive Flashes
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to glimpse potential outcomes of immediate actions (within the next few seconds).

senses.name: X-Ray Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see through solid objects up to Tier × 2 spaces thick, revealing hidden structures or concealed items.

senses.name: Psychic Resonance
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect psychic activity, mental powers in use, or lingering psychic imprints.

senses.name: Dimensional Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see into adjacent dimensions, detect dimensional rifts, or spot interdimensional travelers.

senses.name: Life Detection
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to sense all living creatures within Tier × 100 spaces, regardless of concealment or barriers.

senses.name: Energy Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see all forms of energy (electrical, magical, radioactive) as visible spectrums.

senses.name: Omniscient Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive events occurring anywhere on Earth that you can clearly visualize.

senses.name: Temporal Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see past or future states of objects and locations with perfect clarity.

senses.name: Quantum Perception
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive probability clouds and quantum states simultaneously.

senses.name: Universal Detection
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to sense any specific type of phenomenon anywhere within a city-sized area.

senses.name: Unique Sense
senses.description: Gain a supernatural sense for a specific phenomenon within 10 spaces at Tier 1, doubling with each additional Tier. You automatically detect obvious manifestations; subtle ones require opposed Awareness checks. Examples include effects from a Descriptor, a type of being, or usage of an ability.
